blocks.text: Careers at Rosehill College At Rosehill College, our Careers Department is dedicated to helping students take confident steps towards their future — whether that path leads to employment, further study, trades, or something uniquely their own. We provide practical advice, personalised guidance, and real-world support to help students explore options and make informed choices. Our Commitment What We Offer Our Careers Team can help you: ✅ Write CVs and cover letters ✅ Prepare for job interviews and job hunting ✅ Understand your driver licence options ‍ Study & Training Pathways Explore opportunities with: 🏛️ Universities and Polytechnics 🛠️ Trades training and apprenticeships 🌍 Student exchange programmes 🎖️ The armed forces ‍ Gateway Programme Get real-world experience through our Gateway work placements, designed to give students a taste of working life in different industries. ‍ Book a Careers Appointment Need help figuring out your next steps? Book a one-on-one session with our Careers Advisor for tailored advice and planning. ‍ Visit the Careers Portal Explore all of the above and more on our Careers Portal: Visit the Rosehill College Careers Portal

At Rosehill College, our Careers Department is dedicated to helping students take confident steps towards their future — whether that path leads to employment, further study, trades, or something uniquely their own.
We provide practical advice, personalised guidance, and real-world support to help students explore options and make informed choices.
Our Careers Team can help you:
✅ Prepare for job interviews and job hunting
Get real-world experience through our Gateway work placements, designed to give students a taste of working life in different industries.
Need help figuring out your next steps? Book a one-on-one session with our Careers Advisor for tailored advice and planning.
Explore all of the above and more on our Careers Portal: Visit the Rosehill College Careers Portal
